Comment full text:
I taught 3 different courses for 3 different majors; Culinary Management for Nutrition and Culinary Management, Language and Literacy for Childhood Education majors, Legal Writing and Research for Paralegal majors.
I introduce ePortfolio to students in my courses by showing them how to login through the LaGuardia website with their CUNYFirst credentials, then how to navigate the homepage, and create a new ePortfolio with them. I tell them they can as many ePortfolios as they want for different courses or personal reasons. I tell them it's like LinkedIn but the difference is that, on LinkedIn I tell people I worked or went to school and from a specific timeframe, with ePortfolio I get to show it and customize the viewing experience. What has worked so far with students working will with the platform is showing them the difference customization styles, such as changing the font, changing the color and backgorund, adding different images that I've downloaded or coming straight from Unsplash
